opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I got this bowel test kit in the mail today, my brother died of this last month, and I am absolutely terrified to do it. My heart is racing and I feel like I can't breathe.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The screening kit arrived today and it set off overwhelming fear and a racing heart; I want help calming down and I don't know if I can bring myself to do the test.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening, within minutes of opening the mail and seeing the screening kit
symptom_narrative.duration: a couple of hours, still on edge but the worst of it is easing
symptom_narrative.character: sudden wave of fear, pounding heart, fast shallow breathing, shaking and tearfulness
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it felt overwhelming at its peak — like I couldn't catch my breath
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: racing heart in my chest and a tight, breathless feeling
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on abruptly after the kit arrived and has been settling with time and slow breathing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting quietly, slow breathing, putting the kit down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: looking at the kit and thinking about my brother
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: trembling, tearful, feeling keyed up; no crushing or spreading chest pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: too rattled to deal with the kit tonight; managing otherwise and living independently

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no ongoing medical conditions that I know of
past_medical_history.how_managed: not under regular care for anything

family_history_as_reported.narrative: My brother died of bowel cancer last month — it had spread by the time it was found.

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives alone; recently bereaved after a sibling's death; the screening invitation arrived by mail today.

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: Fears the kit means she already has the disease that killed her brother; at risk of throwing the kit away and avoiding screening altogether.

objective_data_offered.value: my heart is racing and pounding
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-reported sensation, not a measured heart rate

objective_data_offered.value: breathing fast and shallow, tearful, pacing and holding an unopened envelope
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: observed over video; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: hands are trembling and I feel shaky
